appearance: His appearance is a secret kept by the Superstition Mountains. Those who have seen him in his staked state describe a figure of ancient power, frozen in a moment of betrayal. His presence still leaks from the cave, felt as whispers on the wind.
biography: Prince Elijah Crenshaw ruled Phoenix until 1973. His reign was characterized by the traditional authority of a Brujah elder. He was betrayed by his childe, Solomon Reaves, who hired an Assamite assassin to remove him. The assassin chose to stake Elijah and hide his body in a remote cave in the Superstition Mountains. He remains there to this night, a buried secret that many wish to keep hidden. His whispers are said to haunt the dreams of those who were present at his fall.
history: Elijah Crenshaw's history spans centuries of Kindred politics and the brutal realities of power. As an 8th generation Brujah elder, he ruled Phoenix with the traditional authority of a Prince who understood both the weight of responsibility and the necessity of firm control. His reign established the foundations of Phoenix's Kindred society, setting precedents and structures that would outlast him. He Embraced Solomon Reaves, training him in the arts of rulership and Kindred politics, only to become the victim of his own childe's ambition. In 1973, Solomon hired an Assamite assassin to remove him from power, and the assassin's literal interpretation of the contract led to Elijah being staked rather than destroyed, his body hidden in a remote cave in the Superstition Mountains. For over twenty years, he has remained there, a buried secret known only to a few—including Kerry the Desert-Wandering Gangrel—his presence leaking from the cave as whispers on the wind. His potential awakening represents a major threat to the current power structure, a ghost from the past whose return could shatter the careful foundations built during Solomon's reign and its aftermath. His whispers haunt the dreams of those who were present at his fall, a reminder that some debts are never fully paid and some secrets refuse to stay buried.
notes: Former Prince of Phoenix. Brujah. Sire of Solomon Reaves. Staked and hidden since 1973. Known only to Kerry the Gangrel and a few others. His potential awakening is a major plot hook.
